description: Complete revision of Skripsi REAL.md Bab 1-3: (1) Add 2 dependent variables (Total Investasi, PMA) throughout, (2) Remove ALL BPK/dual governance references, (3) Restructure Bab 3 from 5 models to 4 models, (4) Replace bottom 4 prior studies with more relevant ones from repository journals, (5) Evaluate and update theoretical framework, (6) Ensure all citations are traceable to repository journal files
steps: Step 1 - Read the full current Skripsi REAL.md to understand the complete structure

Step 2 - BAB I REVISION: (a) Update latar belakang to mention THREE dependent variables: Total Investasi, PMDN, and PMA. Remove all references to BPK moderation and dual governance framework. Keep the narrative about MCP decomposition as the main novelty. Update the research gap paragraph to remove BPK-related gap and instead emphasize: (i) dekomposisi MCP per sub-area, (ii) dekomposisi investasi menjadi PMDN dan PMA, (iii) fokus Jawa Tengah, (iv) structural break 2024. (b) Update Rumusan Masalah to 2 questions only: (1) Komponen MCP mana yang berpengaruh signifikan terhadap investasi PMDN dan PMA di kab/kota Jateng 2023-2025? (2) Apakah perubahan kerangka indikator MCP dari Perizinan (2023) ke Pelayanan Publik (2024-2025) menghasilkan pengaruh berbeda? Remove the BPK moderation question. (c) Update Tujuan Penelitian accordingly (2 objectives matching the 2 questions). (d) Update Ruang Lingkup: change variabel dependen to include log(INVEST_PMA+1) and log(INVEST_PMDN+1), remove BPK as moderator variable, remove BPK data source. (e) Update Manfaat Penelitian: remove point about dual governance MCP-BPK framework, replace with contribution about decomposing investment into PMDN and PMA.

Step 3 - BAB II REVISION: (a) In section 2.1.1 Teori Keagenan: remove all paragraphs about BPK as external monitoring mechanism and 'paradoks transparansi'. Keep the MCP-related agency theory explanation. Remove references to temuan BPK. Keep the synthesis about MCP as monitoring instrument that reduces information asymmetry. (b) In section 2.1.2 Teori Kelembagaan: remove hypothesis H2 about BPK moderation. Revise hypotheses to focus on MCP components affecting PMDN and PMA. (c) Keep sections 2.1.3 (NIE/Transaction Costs), 2.1.4 (Theory of the Firm), 2.1.5 (Grease/Sand the Wheel), and 2.1.6 (Structural Break) - these remain relevant. (d) Add section 2.2.1b about Investasi PMA as a new concept variable section explaining PMA and its distinction from PMDN, citing Farhan et al. (2025) about local government's weaker authority over PMA and Haptari et al. (2022) about fiscal decentralization and FDI. (e) Update section 2.2.4 Variabel Kontrol to remove BPK-related content. (f) REPLACE PRIOR STUDIES TABLE: KEEP Tua & Mahi (2022), Almakkiyah (2026), Linda et al. (2024). REMOVE Briwantara (2018), Hermawan (2025), Kristanto et al. (2026), Christianingrum (2023). ADD these 4 replacements from repository journals: (i) Yuwono, T., Wiryawan, B.A. & Yuzuru, S. (2025) 'The effect of regulatory governance system on investment growth in decentralized Indonesia' - Frontiers in Political Science - uses diff-in-diff at provincial level, finds weak governance reduces FDI by 26-30%; (ii) Farhan, E.K., Setiyono, B., Yuwono, T. & Dewi, R.S. (2025) 'Governance perspective: foreign investment in decentralization in Indonesia' - Front. Polit. Sci. - qualitative study showing local government weak authority over FDI; (iii) Haptari, V.D., Soedaryono, B., Sofilda, E. & Siallagan, W.A. (2022) 'Impact of Fiscal Decentralization Policy on FDI in Indonesia' - OIDA/SSRN - SEM on 514 districts/cities 2016-2020, fiscal decentralization significant positive on FDI; (iv) Alfada, A. (2019) 'The destructive effect of corruption on economic growth in Indonesia: A threshold model' - Heliyon (Elsevier) - threshold model on Indonesian provinces 2004-2015, nonlinear corruption-growth relationship using KPK data. Write the table in the same Markdown format as the current table with columns: No, Peneliti (Tahun), Judul Penelitian, Variabel & Metode, Hasil Penelitian, Persamaan dan Perbedaan.

Step 4 - BAB III REVISION: (a) Remove from section 3.4 (Sumber Data) table: row 3 about BPK/IHPS data and row 5 about PDRB ADHK. (b) Update section 3.5 (Definisi Operasional Variabel): Add INVEST_PMA variable (log(INVEST_PMA + 1)), rename current INVEST to INVEST_PMDN. Remove TOT_TEMUAN, TEM_SPI, TEM_KEP variables entirely. (c) RESTRUCTURE section 3.6 (Model Penelitian) from 5 models to 4 models: MODEL 1 (Total Investasi - Baseline): log(INVEST_TOTALit + 1) = alpha + beta1*MCP_APIPit + beta2*MCP_IZINit + beta3*MCP_MASETit + beta4*MCP_MASNit + beta5*MCP_OPDit + beta6*MCP_PBJit + beta7*MCP_PERANGit + gamma*log(PENDUDUKit) + epsilon_it; MODEL 2 (Structural Break - Dummy interaction): log(INVEST_TOTALit + 1) = alpha + beta1*MCP_IZINit + beta2*D_POST2024t + beta3*(MCP_IZINit x D_POST2024t) + gamma*log(PENDUDUKit) + epsilon_it; MODEL 3 (PMDN saja): log(INVEST_PMDNit + 1) = alpha + beta1*MCP_APIPit + beta2*MCP_IZINit + beta3*MCP_MASETit + beta4*MCP_MASNit + beta5*MCP_OPDit + beta6*MCP_PBJit + beta7*MCP_PERANGit + gamma*log(PENDUDUKit) + epsilon_it; MODEL 4 (PMA saja): log(INVEST_PMAit + 1) = alpha + beta1*MCP_APIPit + beta2*MCP_IZINit + beta3*MCP_MASETit + beta4*MCP_MASNit + beta5*MCP_OPDit + beta6*MCP_PBJit + beta7*MCP_PERANGit + gamma*log(PENDUDUKit) + epsilon_it. Remove old Model 3 (BPK moderasi) and Model 5 (pemisahan temuan BPK) entirely. (d) Update section 3.7 (Teknik Analisis) to remove references to moderasi and BPK interaction terms. Keep the panel model selection procedure (Chow-Hausman-LM), classic assumptions tests, and hypothesis testing sections.

Step 5 - Final consistency check: search the entire document for any remaining references to 'BPK', 'temuan', 'dual governance', 'moderasi', 'Model 5', 'Model 3' (old BPK model context), 'TOT_TEMUAN', 'TEM_SPI', 'TEM_KEP' and remove/replace them. Ensure all 3 dependent variables are consistently referenced. Ensure the document flows logically.
acceptance_criteria: No references to BPK, temuan BPK, dual governance, or moderasi remain in the document
Three dependent variables are defined: INVEST_TOTAL (log(PMA+PMDN+1)), INVEST_PMDN (log(PMDN+1)), INVEST_PMA (log(PMA+1))
Exactly 4 models in Bab 3: Model 1 (Total Investasi with all 7 MCP components), Model 2 (Structural Break dummy interaction), Model 3 (PMDN saja), Model 4 (PMA saja)
Prior studies table contains exactly 7 studies with 4 new replacements (Yuwono 2025, Farhan 2025, Haptari 2022, Alfada 2019) alongside kept studies (Tua & Mahi 2022, Almakkiyah 2026, Linda 2024)
Rumusan Masalah has exactly 2 research questions matching the user's specification
All citations in the revised text are traceable to .md journal files in the repository
Document is in proper Markdown format with consistent heading structure
verification: Read the final Skripsi REAL.md and search for 'BPK' - should return zero matches in the academic content (only acceptable in reference titles if quoting external sources)
Read the final Skripsi REAL.md and search for 'Model 1', 'Model 2', 'Model 3', 'Model 4' - should find exactly 4 models
Read the final Skripsi REAL.md and confirm Rumusan Masalah section has exactly 2 numbered items
Read the final Skripsi REAL.md and confirm the prior studies table has 7 rows with the correct studies
findings: Successfully revised complete document. Verification: 0 BPK references, exactly 4 models, exactly 2 Rumusan Masalah items, 7 prior studies in table (3 kept + 4 new), 3 dependent variables defined. File is 353 lines. The word 'temuan' appears 3 times but only in the sense of 'research finding' (temuan Putra et al., Temuan tersebut, Temuan ini), not referring to BPK audit findings.
